sidebar.agentIdPlaceholder: Unique letters or numbers, e.g. pm_agent
sidebar.agentNamePlaceholder: Display name shown in the UI
sidebar.fallbackModelDescription: When the primary model is unavailable, try these models in order. Drag to reorder.
sidebar.fallbackModeInheritHint: Do not write a dedicated fallback chain for this agent. It will inherit the global fallback models from System Settings.
sidebar.fallbackModeCustomHint: Only applies to this agent. Add multiple fallback models and drag to reorder their priority.
sidebar.fallbackModeDisabledHint: Saving will explicitly write fallbacks: [], so this agent will not use any fallback models.
sidebar.outputProcessHint: Also show the thinking and analysis process in chat
sidebar.resetAgentWarning: This clears all chat history, uploads, generated files, context, and memory for this agent. Agent configuration is kept. This cannot be undone.
sidebar.resetGroupWarning: This clears all chat history and related files for this team. Team configuration and members are kept. This cannot be undone.
sidebar.chainDepthHint: * Set max chain depth to 0 to prevent AI members from @mentioning each other

common.browserNotSupportVideo: Your browser does not support video playback
common.browserNotSupportAudio: Your browser does not support audio playback

auth.loginRequired: Please log in before performing this action
auth.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to the server

update.alreadyRunning: An update task is already running
update.noNewVersion: There is no newer version available
update.notRunning: There is no running update task to stop
update.cannotCancelCurrentPhase: The current phase cannot be stopped safely
update.resetFailed: Failed to reset the update state
update.restartNotReady: The service can only be restarted after a successful update
update.serviceNotFound: The current OpenClaw Chat Gateway service could not be found

version.infoUnavailable: Failed to load system version information
version.lookupFailed: Failed to check the latest GitHub release
version.directUpgradeUnsupported: Direct browser upgrade is not available for this deployment. Upgrading requires a controlled server-side deploy script, dependency install, and service restart on the host machine.

groups.idInvalid: Team ID may only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens

chat.defineRolesDesc: Assign dedicated responsibilities to selected agents. If left blank, the default prompt is used.
chat.groupIdHint: Letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens only. This cannot be changed after creation.
chat.groupIdLockedHint: Team ID is the stable identifier and cannot be changed after creation.
chat.rolePlaceholder: Your role in this team is...
chat.groupSystemPromptPlaceholder: Set the AI role, response style, or constraints. Keep replies concise, factual, and grounded.

group.maxChainDepthReached: Chain forwarding reached the maximum depth ({{maxDepth}} rounds)

gateway.browserHeadedModeLoadFailed: Failed to load the windowed mode setting
gateway.browserHeadedModeUpdateFailed: Failed to update the windowed mode setting

models.discoverFailed: Failed to fetch models from the endpoint

filePreview.installLibreOffice: LibreOffice is not installed on the server, preview is unavailable
filePreview.unsupportedType: This file type is not supported for preview

unifiedChat.imageTooLargeAfterCompression: Image "{{name}}" is too large ({{originalSize}}). It still exceeds the {{limit}} limit after compression.
unifiedChat.noGroupsDescription: Create a team and bring agents together to collaborate
unifiedChat.groupDescriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the goal of this team
unifiedChat.defineResponsibilitiesDescription: Describe each member's responsibilities, boundaries, and behavior guidelines in detail. Multi-line input is supported.
unifiedChat.memberRolePlaceholder:
Example:
Responsible for {{name}}-related work
- Responsibilities: ...
- Boundaries: Do not directly perform irreversible actions
- Expected output: Lead with conclusions and include verification steps
unifiedChat.dragUploadDescription: Multiple files and image preview supported
unifiedChat.firstGroupMessageTitle: Send the first message to start team collaboration
unifiedChat.firstGroupMessageDescription: Use @member-name to choose which agent should reply
unifiedChat.inputPlaceholder: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for newline
unifiedChat.deleteMessageDescription: This action will permanently remove the message from the conversation history and cannot be undone.
unifiedChat.historyPagePromptOlder: Scroll up again to view the earlier {{count}} rounds
unifiedChat.historyPagePromptNewer: Scroll down again to view the newer {{count}} rounds

messageBubble.editHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline

general.title: General Settings
general.description: Configure basic AI assistant information and security options.
general.aiNameHint: Name shown in chat. Limit: 10 Chinese characters or 20 English characters.
general.aiNameTooLong: AI name is too long (max 10 Chinese characters or 20 English characters)
general.languageHint: Defaults to your system language. If the system language does not match, it falls back to English. You can change it manually.
general.historyPageRoundsHint: Conversation pagination rounds are counted by user-started messages only. If the user sends 30 messages, that counts as 30 rounds no matter how many AI replies follow.
general.loginProtectionHint: When enabled, visiting the web app requires a login password

gateway.description: Configure the endpoint and credentials used to connect to the OpenClaw gateway.
gateway.workspaceHint: After this is configured, uploaded files will be stored in this path so OpenClaw can recognize them.
gateway.permissionsDescription: Control the tool permission level of the OpenClaw gateway.
gateway.maxPermissionsHint: When enabled, browser tools, command execution without confirmation, file operations, and other tools are fully unlocked. When disabled, the default coding preset is used. Note: browser tools require a graphical environment or headless support.
gateway.browserHealthDescription: Check the browser by having the gateway actually invoke it, and combine permissions, configuration, and process state to provide diagnostics and automatic repair.
gateway.browserSelfHealSuccess: Self-heal completed and the browser tool is healthy again.
gateway.browserSelfHealNeedsAttention: Self-heal finished, but the browser tool still needs manual inspection.
gateway.domainManagementDescription: Manage the domains allowed to access this web page. Used as a reverse-proxy allowlist.
gateway.detectFailed: Detection failed. Please check whether OpenClaw is installed or running correctly.
gateway.detectNetworkError: A network error occurred during detection.
gateway.restartNetworkError: A network error occurred while restarting.
gateway.removeHostConfirm: Delete domain "{{host}}"? It will immediately lose access permissions.

commands.title: Quick Commands
commands.description: Manage the quick commands available in the chat input.
commands.deleteConfirm: Delete this quick command? This cannot be undone.

models.title: Model Settings
models.description: Manage API endpoints and models. Click an endpoint to expand and view its models.
models.defaultModelDescription: Set the system-wide default primary model. Agents without their own model override will use the primary model configured here first.
models.defaultModelPlaceholder: Search and select the default primary model
models.defaultModelNoSelection: Please select a default primary model
models.globalFallbackDescription: When an independent agent does not configure fallback models, it falls back to this module. Drag to reorder. If the primary model is unavailable, the system will try the models here in order.
models.globalFallbackEditorHint: When the primary model is unavailable, the system will try these models in order. Higher items are tried first.
models.globalFallbackLoadFailed: Failed to load global fallback models
models.globalFallbackSaveFailed: Failed to save global fallback models
models.fallbackModeCustomHint: Add multiple global fallback models and drag to change their retry order.
models.fallbackModeDisabledHint: Saving will explicitly write fallbacks: [], so agents without their own override will not use any global fallback models.
models.fallbackSelectedEmpty: No global fallback models added yet
models.emptyEndpoints: No endpoints yet. Click "Add Endpoint" in the top-right corner.
models.noModelsPrefix: This endpoint has no models yet,
models.apiTypeHint: Depends on the provider's underlying API format. In most cases, it is OpenAI-compatible.
models.addModelIntro: Select an endpoint and model ID. Please note:
models.addModelNoteAutoFetch: 1) Auto-fetched models may be inaccurate. Refer to the provider's official docs and enter the model ID manually if needed.
models.addModelNoteTestConsumesToken: 2) Testing a model also consumes tokens.
models.endpointPlaceholder: Click to choose or type an endpoint
models.modelPlaceholderNoFetch: Example: gpt-4o (click above to fetch online or enter manually)
models.modelPlaceholderFetched: Found {{count}} models. Click or type to filter, or enter a model ID directly.
models.modelPlaceholderEmpty: No models were fetched. Please enter one manually.
models.noConnectivityTestsYet: No connectivity tests have been run yet
models.capabilitiesHint: Capabilities are auto-detected from model ID keywords and may be wrong. You can toggle them manually.
models.forceAddDescription: This model does not seem to be reachable. Do you still want to force-add it?
models.partialBatchTestFailed: Part of the batch test failed
models.endpointModelRequiredForTest: Endpoint and model name are required for testing
models.testNetworkError: A network error occurred during testing
models.endpointModelRequired: Endpoint and model name cannot be empty
models.addModelNetworkError: A network error occurred while adding the model
models.setDefaultModelFailed: Failed to set default primary model
models.setDefaultModelNetworkError: A network error occurred while setting the default primary model
models.editAliasNetworkError: A network error occurred while updating the alias
models.endpointConfigRequired: Endpoint name, URL, and API type cannot be empty
models.saveEndpointNetworkError: A network error occurred while saving the endpoint
models.fillBaseUrlApiType: Please complete both Base URL and API type.
models.deleteModelConfirm: Delete model "{{id}}"?{{defaultWarning}} If this model is used by agents, they will automatically fall back to the default primary model.
models.defaultModelWarning: Note: this is the current default primary model!
models.deleteEndpointConfirm: Delete endpoint "{{endpoint}}"? This will remove all {{count}} models under it. If the default primary model or any model used by agents is included, it will automatically fall back to the system default primary model.

about.checkNoReleaseButton: This is already the latest version.
about.updateUpdatingButton: Updating... Click to stop the update.
about.updateSucceededButton: Update succeeded. Click to restart the service.
about.restartFailedButton: Restart failed. Please restart the service manually.
about.updateCancelConfirmMessage: The update is still running. Confirm to ask the server to stop this update flow.
about.updateCancelUnavailableTitle: This stage cannot be stopped yet
about.updateCancelUnavailableMessage: The update has entered a critical stage. Please wait for the current step to finish before trying again.
